message:
fix(tty): process resize events on POLLNVAL fallback path

The POLLNVAL handler had an early return that skipped
drain_resize_notifications() when no keyboard/mouse events were found.
The resize fd is a UnixStream (not /dev/tty), so poll(2) works fine on
it — a pending SIGWINCH would be silently dropped, causing the terminal
to not re-layout after a window resize on macOS.

Restructure the POLLNVAL branch to always process resize_ready before
any early return.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
